notes: University campus shuttle services. Only UP Diliman Ikot/Toki qualify as de facto public transit (LTFRB-franchised, open to public, in Sakay.ph). Ateneo e-jeepney is free but private. DLSU Arrows Express is restricted.

key_stops: NIGS / Engineering Library II / CS Library
routes.frequency_notes: High frequency during class hours (multiple jeepneys on circuit); lower evenings and weekends. Operates 5:00 AM – ~9:00 PM on school days.
routes.notes: LTFRB-franchised PUJ route. Sakay.ph route ID: DOTR:R_SAKAY_PUJ_2156. Also on Moovit. Counterclockwise loop entirely within UP Diliman campus (~500 ha). Open to general public. Operated by Maroon Riders Transport Cooperative / North UP Campus Transport Cooperative. Identifier: yellow roof, 'IKOT' windshield sign. Route modified September 2022 (exits at Magsaysay Portal, re-enters via Shuster St).
routes.operator: Maroon Riders Transport Cooperative / North UP Campus Transport Cooperative

routes.frequency_notes: Operates 5:00 AM – ~5:00 PM on school days. Restored February 5, 2024.
routes.notes: LTFRB-franchised PUJ. Clockwise loop; counterpart to Ikot. Name 'Toki' is reverse of 'Ikot'. Formally restored February 5, 2024 per UP Diliman OVCCA memorandum. Identifier: yellow roof with red lining, 'TOKI' windshield sign. Official info: pages.upd.edu.ph/ikotokipara/home. Open to general public.

key_stops: Ateneo de Manila University (Loyola Heights gate area)
routes.frequency_notes: Frequent during peak hours; less frequent evenings
routes.notes: LTFRB-franchised PUJ. Identifier: red roof. Connects UP Diliman to LRT-2 Katipunan Station, Ateneo, and Miriam College. Open to public.
LTFRB-franchised PUJ. Identifier: green roof. Connects UP Diliman to Commonwealth Avenue jeepneys/buses at Philcoa. Open to public.

routes.destination: SM City North EDSA / Trinoma / MRT-3 Quezon Avenue Station
routes.notes: LTFRB-franchised PUJ. Identifier: green roof. Connects UP Diliman to MRT-3 and North EDSA malls. Open to public. Some sources list as 'UP-MRT' (to QA MRT Station) and 'UP-SM North' as separate routes; treated here as one cluster. Exact routing needs field verification.

routes.route_name: Ateneo de Manila E-Jeepney (Line A & B)
routes.origin: Internal campus (Ateneo de Manila University, Loyola Heights, QC)
routes.frequency_notes: ~25 trips/day per line. ~10 electric jeepneys in fleet. Operates during class/business hours.
routes.notes: Private university e-jeepney service. Free for all users including visitors. Two lines: Line A (express via Gate 1 as of Feb 2025) and Line B. First academic institution in Philippines to operate in-campus e-jeepney. NOT LTFRB-franchised. Not in Sakay.ph or transit apps. Campus-internal only; does not extend to Katipunan Ave.
routes.operator: Ateneo de Manila University (launched with Meralco Energy Inc.)

routes.origin: DLSU Manila (MRR East Canopy / Gil Puyat Ave, Taft Avenue, Manila)
routes.destination: DLSU Laguna Campus (via SLEX / STC area, Bay, Laguna)
key_stops: Petron Station, Gil Puyat Ave (Manila disembarkation)
routes.frequency_notes: Schedule-based, advance reservation required via SSRS system. Multiple lines (Lines 1–5) with varying schedules.
routes.notes: RESTRICTED — not public transit. For DLSU students, faculty, and staff with official business only. Booking required via Shuttle Service Reservation System (SSRS). Line 1 free for all students; ID 113 (Laguna students) free on all lines. DLSU Laguna also has a short e-jeep from Laguna Central (Phoenix Station, SLEX) to campus at ~30-min intervals. NOT LTFRB-franchised. NOT for inclusion in public GTFS feed.
